name: PT Argha Karya Prima Industry Tbk
summary: PT Argha Karya Prima Industry Tbk manufacturers, markets, trades, and distributes flexible packaging films in Indonesia, Asia, Africa, America, the Middle East, Europe, Australia, and New Zealand. It operates through two segments, Manufacturing and Distribution. The company offers biaxially oriented poly propylene films and polyester films. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Bogor, Indonesia. PT Argha Karya Prima Industry Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Nawa Panduta.
